sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Willdan Group stock hits all-time high at 135.27 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Willdan Group's stock reached an all-time high of $135.27, marking a 259% increase over the past year. This growth follows strong Q3 2025 financial results, the acquisition of Compass Municipal Advisors, and a significant $97 million contract with Alameda County for energy upgrades. Wedbush also raised its price target for the company to $145 with an Outperform rating.

feed.title: Brinker Stock Rises as Chili’s Powers Earnings Beat, Higher Guidance
feed.summary: Brinker International, owner of Chili's Grill & Bar and Maggiano's Little Italy, announced better-than-expected quarterly earnings, leading to a temporary increase in its stock price. The positive results were largely driven by the strong performance of its Chili's brand. The company also provided higher guidance, suggesting continued optimism for its financial outlook.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Lowered Diamondback Energy, Inc. (FANG) Target to $171 And Maintained Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has lowered its price target for Diamondback Energy, Inc. (FANG) to $171 from $183, while maintaining an Overweight rating, citing updated oil price assumptions for 2026-27 and expectations of weaker cash flow. This adjustment follows a similar action by Mizuho, which also slightly reduced its target to $194 ahead of FANG's fourth-quarter earnings report. Diamondback Energy is an independent oil and natural gas company focused on the Permian Basin.

feed.title: Newmont Goldcorp stock hits all-time high at 134.33 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Newmont Goldcorp's stock reached an all-time high of $134.33, demonstrating a 222.64% one-year return and strong investor confidence within the Metals & Mining industry. The company, valued at $145.57 billion with a "GREAT" financial health rating, is capitalizing on rising gold demand despite recent operational challenges like bushfire damage impacting its Boddington output and fluctuating analyst ratings and share sale agreements.

feed.title: STERIS plc announces $0.63 quarterly dividend payable in March By Investing.com
feed.summary: STERIS plc (NYSE:STE) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.63 per share, payable on March 19, 2026. This extends the company's 21-year streak of dividend payments, showcasing an annual yield of 0.96% and 10.53% dividend growth over the last year. The healthcare and life sciences products provider, with a market capitalization of $25.57 billion, maintains a "GREAT" financial health score according to InvestingPro.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) Releases Earnings Results, Beats Estimates By $0.06 EPS
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) announced its quarterly earnings, surpassing analyst estimates with an EPS of $2.23 against a consensus of $2.17. The company also reported revenues of $5.60 billion, slightly above the $5.57 billion estimate. Institutional investors hold a significant portion of its shares, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock.

feed.title: Altria earnings fall short amid lower cigarette sales and competition for nicotine products
feed.summary: Altria reported flat earnings, falling short of Wall Street expectations, primarily due to declining cigarette sales and intense competition in the market for newer nicotine products like pouches. The company is struggling to gain market share in e-cigarettes and nicotine pouches, with its "on! Plus" brand losing ground to competitors like Philip Morris International's Zyn. Altria's efforts to diversify face setbacks, including a $1.3 billion charge on its NJOY vaping business following a patent infringement ruling.

feed.title: IntercontinentalExchange (ICE) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
feed.summary: IntercontinentalExchange (ICE) is projected to report increased earnings and higher revenues for the quarter ending December 2025. While the Zacks Consensus Estimate shows a positive outlook and recent EPS revisions are slightly higher, the Most Accurate Estimate for ICE is lower, resulting in a negative Earnings ESP. Given this, combined with a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), it's difficult to conclusively predict an earnings beat, despite the company's strong history of exceeding EPS expectations in recent quarters.

feed.title: Legend Biotech stock hits 52-week low at $18.07 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Legend Biotech (LEGN) stock has reached a new 52-week low of $18.07, representing a 49.61% decline over the past year and a 56% drop in the last six months due to broader biotech challenges and an earnings miss for its CARVYKTI product. Despite this, the company maintains a strong financial position with more cash than debt and significant revenue growth, and analysts still see considerable upside potential, with some reiterating Buy ratings based on upcoming clinical milestones and regulatory developments.

feed.title: Valero Energy says it will buy Venezuelan crude from three sellers
feed.summary: Valero Energy announced it will purchase Venezuelan crude from three authorized sellers, expecting it to constitute a significant portion of its heavy crude supply in February and March. The company projects its capacity to process Venezuelan crude will exceed 240,000 barrels per day. This move is anticipated to benefit U.S. refiners following efforts to boost Venezuela's oil output.

feed.title: Uniphore Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Customer Data Platforms
feed.summary: Uniphore, the Business AI company, has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Customer Data Platforms, specifically for its Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute. The company emphasizes its data warehouse-native, zero-copy architecture that integrates with existing platforms like Snowflake and Databricks, reducing costs and accelerating time to value. Uniphore's approach focuses on enterprise-wide, real-time decision-making and intelligence, with a platform designed for speed, precision, and scalability in personalization.

feed.title: U.S. vaccine hesitancy could impact investment
feed.summary: Growing vaccine hesitancy in the U.S. is expected to deter venture capital investment in vaccine startups and could reduce valuations for private equity-backed clinical research organizations. This trend is already impacting major pharmaceutical companies like Moderna, which is halting new infectious disease vaccine studies due to concerns about market access and ROI. Despite this, some investors believe the disruption will be temporary, anticipating a shift in public opinion as preventable diseases resurface.

feed.title: IBM, Royal Caribbean Cruises, Lockheed Martin, AT&T And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Thursday
feed.summary: Several major stocks, including IBM, Royal Caribbean Cruises, Lockheed Martin, and AT&T, saw significant gains on Thursday. Many of these companies reported better-than-expected quarterly financial results and issued optimistic guidance for the upcoming year. Despite an overall market downturn with the Nasdaq Composite falling, these individual stocks outperformed, driven by strong earnings and positive outlooks.

feed.title: AT&T Earnings: Competition Remains Intense, but Management’s Outlook Points to Stability
feed.summary: AT&T's fourth-quarter revenue increased by 3.6%, driven largely by higher smartphone sales, and the company projects consistent service revenue growth, improving margins, and free cash flow generation through 2028. While it's gaining postpaid phone customers, increased revenue growth reflects intense wireless competition rather than fundamental business improvements, as customer churn remains high. Morningstar maintains its $26 fair value estimate, noting management's confidence in stable wireless competition and reduced future spectrum investment needs.

feed.title: Parker Hannifin Raises Outlook On Aerospace Momentum
feed.summary: Parker Hannifin (NYSE: PH) reported strong Q2 fiscal 2026 results, surpassing analyst expectations for earnings and revenue, driven by robust aerospace demand and industrial market recovery. The company raised its full-year EPS and sales guidance, citing record backlog and significant growth in its Aerospace Systems segment. Shares reacted positively, trading higher after the announcement.

feed.title: United Rentals Q4 2025 slides: revenue growth slows, stock drops on missed forecasts
feed.summary: United Rentals (NYSE:URI) reported Q4 2025 revenue of $4.21 billion and adjusted EPS of $11.09, both missing analyst expectations, leading to an 11.32% drop in its stock price. Despite slower growth in Q4, the company achieved full-year 2025 revenue of $16.1 billion and adjusted EBITDA of $7.3 billion. United Rentals maintains a strong balance sheet, generates substantial free cash flow, and focuses on strategic initiatives like expanding its specialty segment and investing in technology, while also increasing its dividend and planning share repurchases for 2026.

feed.title: Align Technology (ALGN) Just Flashed Golden Cross Signal: Do You Buy?
feed.summary: Align Technology (ALGN) has recently shown a "golden cross" signal, where its 50-day simple moving average crossed above its 200-day simple moving average, indicating a potential bullish breakout. The company also holds a #2 (Buy) Zacks Rank with a positive earnings outlook, reinforcing the bullish case. Investors might consider ALGN for future gains due to its technical indicators and favorable earnings estimate revisions.

feed.title: Lubbock's Beauty Scene Could Expand With A New Ulta Store In 2026
feed.summary: Lubbock may soon get a second Ulta Beauty store, with development trackers suggesting a new location in the Commons South area. Although Ulta has not officially announced it, this expansion would cater to the city's growing retail demands, especially in South Lubbock, offering more convenience and access to beauty products and services. Construction could potentially begin in 2026, with an opening later the same year.

feed.title: Here's Why Paccar (PCAR) is a Strong Momentum Stock
feed.summary: Paccar (PCAR) is identified as a strong momentum stock based on Zacks' Style Scores. The article explains the methodology behind the Zacks Rank and Style Scores (Value, Growth, Momentum, and VGM), emphasizing how combining a high Zacks Rank with strong Style Scores can lead to better investment decisions. PCAR holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) but has an "A" Momentum Style Score and a "B" VGM Score, making it an attractive option for momentum investors.

feed.title: Stifel Raises Price Target for Lam Research (LRCX) to $280 | LRC
feed.summary: Stifel has reaffirmed its "Buy" rating for Lam Research (LRCX) and increased its price target from $250 to $280, signaling an optimistic future outlook. This follows similar bullish adjustments from other analysts including Citigroup, Deutsche Bank, Needham, and UBS, reinforcing confidence in the company's semiconductor sector position. Despite the positive analyst sentiment, GuruFocus estimates a potential downside for LRCX's GF Value compared to its current price.

feed.title: Recycling possible for PS petri dishes, other lab equipment
feed.summary: A feasibility study conducted by Becton, Dickinson & Co. and Envetec Sustainable Technologies indicates that plastic petri dishes and other laboratory equipment made from polystyrene (PS) could be recycled. This research explores a circular lifecycle for these widely used lab items, addressing the environmental impact of single-use plastics in scientific settings.

feed.title: Here's Why ResMed (RMD) is a Strong Momentum Stock
feed.summary: ResMed (RMD) has been identified as a strong momentum stock according to Zacks Style Scores, boasting a Zacks Rank of #2 (Buy) and a VGM Score of A. The company, a major player in sleep-disordered breathing and respiratory care, has seen its shares rise 7% in the past four weeks, with analysts revising earnings estimates upwards for fiscal 2026. This indicates a promising outlook for investors seeking momentum-driven stocks.

feed.title: How Phillips 66's Integrated Model Enhances Profitability & Resilience
feed.summary: Phillips 66 (PSX) is well-positioned to benefit from falling crude prices, which reduce input costs for its refining operations and boost profitability. The company's diversified business model, spanning midstream, chemicals, and renewables, provides earnings stability, allowing it to sustain profitability even during weaker refining environments. PSX also focuses on divesting non-core assets to invest in high-return opportunities and enhance shareholder returns.

feed.title: Elevance Health latest health insurer to lower 2026 revenue expectations
feed.summary: Elevance Health has become the latest health insurer to lower its 2026 revenue expectations, following a trend of disappointing financial reports across the industry. The company reported an adjusted operating loss in Q4 2025 and a decrease in medical membership, primarily due to higher medical cost trends and attrition in its Medicaid business. This news comes shortly after UnitedHealth Group also gave a lower forecast and the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services released a "disappointing" Medicare Advantage payment advance notice.

feed.title: Costco vs. Dollar General: Which Discount Retailer Is the Better Buy?
feed.summary: This article compares Costco and Dollar General, two prominent discount retailers, to determine which offers a better investment opportunity. While Costco boasts a robust membership model and strong growth, its high valuation limits future upside. Dollar General, however, is undergoing a successful operational turnaround with store upgrades and margin recovery, making it a more compelling choice for investors at its current, attractive entry point.

feed.title: Starbucks to add 650 stores worldwide as CEO Niccol's restructuring plan shows early results
feed.summary: Starbucks plans to open 650 new stores worldwide in 2026, indicating early success for CEO Niccol's "Back to Starbucks" restructuring plan. Despite previous store closures and operational changes, the company states the strategy is progressing ahead of schedule. As a result, Starbucks is now preparing for significant global expansion.

feed.title: Hightouch Named a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Customer Data Platforms
feed.summary: Hightouch has been recognized as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Customer Data Platforms, marking its first inclusion in this prestigious evaluation. The company's warehouse-native platform enables organizations to activate customer data directly from cloud data warehouses, facilitating personalized experiences and measurable business results for marketing, sales, and customer engagement. This recognition highlights a significant shift towards composable architectures and warehouse-native activation in the customer data platform market.

feed.title: Northern Trust Asset Management appoints de Lange as chief innovation strategist
feed.summary: Northern Trust Asset Management has appointed Gijsbert de Lange as its first chief innovation strategist. In this new role, de Lange will lead innovation across the investment team, focusing on embedding advanced AI technologies and cutting-edge research into the firm’s investment capabilities. This appointment reflects Northern Trust's commitment to innovation and its strong market performance, with a 37.11% price return over the past year.

feed.title: Inside Keysight's push to solve AI data center wiring bottlenecks
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies and Point2 Technology are collaborating to address critical connectivity bottlenecks in AI and machine learning data centers. They are validating Point2's e-Tube™ multi-terabit interconnect technology using Keysight's high-speed digital test solutions, aiming to provide a more power-efficient, cost-effective, and lower-latency alternative to traditional copper and optical interconnects. This partnership leverages Keysight's advanced testing capabilities to ensure the new interconnects meet the stringent requirements of hyperscalers.

feed.title: Caterpillar stock rises on revenue and earnings beats, demand for power-generation equipment
feed.summary: Caterpillar (CAT) stock surged after reporting higher-than-expected profits and revenue, driven by strong demand for its power-generation equipment, particularly from the build-out of AI data centers. The company's power and energy segment saw significant growth, with its order backlog reaching a record high of $51.2 billion. Despite potential tariff headwinds, Caterpillar expects continued strong demand, focusing on increasing supply to meet orders.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan Stock (FCX) Rises as Copper’s Price Hits All-Time High
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) stock is increasing due to copper prices reaching an all-time high of over $14,000 per tonne, driven by strong demand from technology companies, speculative trading in China, and geopolitical safe-haven buying. The company, a major copper producer and operator of the world's largest gold mine, has seen its stock rise 22% year-to-date and 75% in the last 12 months. Despite a nearly 7.40% implied downside from current levels, analysts widely rate FCX stock as a Strong Buy based on 13 Buy and two Hold recommendations.

feed.title: YPF Luz Issues US$45 Million Class XXIII Notes in Argentine Market
feed.summary: YPF Luz has issued US$45 million Class XXIII Notes in the Argentine market. Bruchou & Funes de Rioja advised YPF Energía Eléctrica S.A. (YPF Luz), while TCA Tanoira Cassagne advised the arrangers and placement agents involved in the transaction. The article mentions that a standard 1-year membership is required to access the full content.

feed.title: Hawkins Inc (NASDAQ:HWKN) Reports Q3 Revenue and EPS Miss, Stock Reaction Muted
feed.summary: Hawkins Inc (NASDAQ:HWKN) reported a miss on both Q3 fiscal 2026 revenue and non-GAAP EPS, with figures of $244.1 million and $0.72 respectively, falling short of analyst estimates. Despite the miss, the stock's reaction was muted, showing no significant movement in after-hours trading. The company also declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.19 per share, and investors are now looking towards Q4 and full-year 2026 estimates for future performance.

feed.title: Stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq sink as Microsoft's post-earnings plunge drags tech down
feed.summary: US stocks, particularly the S&P 500 and Nasdaq, experienced a tech-driven selloff after Microsoft's earnings report spooked investors, causing its stock to plunge over 10%. Despite Meta's strong revenue outlook and subsequent stock gains, concerns about Microsoft's capital spending and slowing cloud sales, alongside Tesla's shift in strategy and first-ever annual revenue decline, contributed to the market dip. Geopolitical tensions between the US and Iran also caused gold and oil prices to rally.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Reports Net Sales Growth in Q4 2025, Releases 2026 Financial Guidance
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company announced its financial results for Q4 and the full fiscal year 2025, reporting increased net sales despite consumer spending shifts. The company also issued its financial outlook for fiscal year 2026, projecting continued net sales and comparable store sales growth, along with plans for new store openings and operational enhancements.

feed.title: The Truth About EPAM Systems Inc: Is This Quiet Tech Stock a Hidden Cheat Code?
feed.summary: EPAM Systems Inc. (EPAM) is presented as a "quiet operator" in the tech industry, building digital infrastructure for major clients while others focus on meme stocks and AI fads. The article questions whether EPAM is a valuable investment due to its engineering depth and long-term potential, despite its stock volatility, comparing it to larger rivals like Accenture. It concludes that EPAM is a potential "cop" for long-term, research-heavy investors willing to delve into its fundamentals, rather than a hype-driven "meme rocket."

feed.title: FirstEnergy (FE) Upgraded to ‘Outperform’ at Wolfe Research
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE:FE) was upgraded to 'Outperform' from 'Peer Perform' by Wolfe Research on January 27, with a price target of $50, citing increased Federal Energy Regulatory Commission transmission capital expenditure upside. This pushes the utility's rate base growth to 10%, and Wolfe Research anticipates FE's earnings growth will be at the higher end of 6-8%. Additionally, Morgan Stanley also raised its price target for FE to $49 from $47 on January 21, maintaining an 'Overweight' rating, and noted that the utilities sector underperformed the wider market in December 2025.

feed.title: Dominion Energy (D) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.6675 per Share
feed.summary: Dominion Energy, Inc. (NYSE:D) has declared its 392nd consecutive quarterly dividend of $0.6675 per share, payable on March 20, 2026, to shareholders as of February 27. The utility provides electricity and natural gas services and offers an attractive annual dividend yield of 4.37%. Additionally, a federal judge recently approved the resumption of work on the company's $11.2 billion Virginia offshore wind project, which is nearing completion.

feed.title: Duke Energy (DUK) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $1.065 per Share
feed.summary: Duke Energy Corporation (DUK) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.065 per share, payable on March 16 to shareholders of record as of February 13. The utility company, known for its stable cash flows and 99 consecutive years of dividend payments, currently boasts an annual dividend yield of 3.54%. Despite a recent price target reduction by RBC Capital, the stock still indicates an upside of over 16%.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on PPG Industries to $122 From $110, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for PPG Industries to $122 from $110, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst news of various other analyst firms also updating their price targets and ratings for PPG Industries. The company recently reported its Q4 2025 earnings and provided guidance for the full year 2026, which included a profit forecast below estimates due to weak demand.

feed.title: Western Digital Stock Is in Overbought Territory Ahead of Earnings. Is It Still Worth a Buy After Seagate’s Blowout?
feed.summary: Western Digital (WDC) shares gained after peer Seagate Technology's strong Q2 results, leading to an overbought RSI. Despite this, the stock is considered a buy due to strong AI data center adoption, technical advantages with HAMR technology, and upcoming Q4 earnings that are expected to show an 18% profit increase. Wall Street maintains a "Strong Buy" rating with high price targets.

feed.title: Synchrony Financial (SYF) Price Target Lowered by Truist Securit
feed.summary: Truist Securities has lowered its price target for Synchrony Financial (SYF) to $84.00 from $92.00 while maintaining a Hold rating. This adjustment follows similar actions from other major analysts like BTIG, Barclays, RBC Capital, and JP Morgan, who have also reduced their price targets for the credit card provider. Despite these reductions, the average target price from 21 analysts still implies an upside of 24.13% from the current price.

feed.title: March 13th Options Now Available For Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG)
feed.summary: New options contracts for Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) with a March 13th expiration date are now available. BNK Invest highlights a put contract at a $38.00 strike price and a call contract at a $40.00 strike price, detailing how these options could be utilized by investors for potential returns or to reduce cost basis. The article also provides implied volatility and annualized YieldBoost percentages for both options.

feed.title: Evergy (EVRG) Price Target Reduced to $91
feed.summary: RBC Capital analyst Stephen D’Ambrisi recently lowered the price target for Evergy, Inc. (EVRG) from $93 to $91, while maintaining an ‘Outperform’ rating. This adjustment comes as part of a broader review of the utilities sector in anticipation of Q4 earnings. Conversely, Wells Fargo increased its price target from $77 to $79, holding an ‘Equal Weight’ rating due to valuation concerns despite acknowledging potential EPS growth.

feed.title: ONEOK: My Top 3 Reasons To Buy The Stock (NYSE: OKE)
feed.summary: ONEOK (OKE) is a strong buy, transforming into an integrated energy toll booth from wellhead to export markets. The company is uniquely positioned to capitalize on surging natural gas demand from AI-driven data centers, particularly in the Sun Belt and Permian regions. Despite recent outperformance, OKE trades at a discount with a 5.28% dividend yield and is expected to achieve robust free cash flow through synergies and rapid deleveraging.

feed.title: G2 to Acquire Key Platforms from Gartner (IT)
feed.summary: G2 is set to acquire Capterra, Software Advice, and GetApp from Gartner (IT), aiming to consolidate the B2B software review market and enhance software discovery and purchasing processes with AI. This merger will combine leading platforms, providing extensive customer reviews and serving numerous global software vendors. Gartner, despite a strong financial position, faces high leverage while maintaining robust revenue growth and profitability.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Hilton (HLT) After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run
feed.summary: This article analyzes Hilton Worldwide Holdings (HLT) to determine if its current share price of around US$296 still offers value after significant multi-year gains. Using a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis and P/E ratio comparison, the article concludes that Hilton appears significantly overvalued, suggesting a possible premium of 129.9% above its intrinsic value and a P/E ratio higher than both industry and peer averages. It also introduces "Narratives" as a way for investors to create their own valuation models based on their beliefs about the company.

feed.title: Dollar Tree Philanthropy On Childhood Hunger And Its Role In Brand Story
feed.summary: Dollar Tree has committed $1.5 million to Share Our Strength's No Kid Hungry campaign, becoming the largest supporter of the Mayors Alliance to End Childhood Hunger. This philanthropic effort aligns with Dollar Tree's repositioning towards multi-price assortments and an increased focus on grocery essentials, aiming to enhance customer trust and brand perception. While not a direct financial catalyst, the initiative could strengthen community ties and differentiate the company amidst competitive retail landscapes.

feed.title: TD Cowen Adjusts Bristol-Myers Squibb Price Target to $60 From $54, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: TD Cowen has raised its price target for Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMY) to $60 from $54, while maintaining a Hold rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a moderated outlook, keeping the pharmaceutical giant in a neutral investment position despite the increased target. The report follows other recent analyst adjustments for BMY, indicating varying perspectives on the company's valuation.

feed.title: Assessing Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) Valuation After Fund Exit And Setback For Journavx Pain Label
feed.summary: A major investment fund has fully exited Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) after the company's pain drug, Journavx, faced a setback with the FDA regarding a broad neuropathic chronic pain label. Despite this, Vertex's stock has shown resilience, with a 90-day return of 13.82% and a significant 3-year total return, leading to discussions on whether its current valuation still offers an entry point for investors or if future growth is already priced in. The company's valuation is largely supported by its cystic fibrosis cash flows and a diverse pipeline, though risks remain concerning its CF drug's resilience and clinical program successes.
